images.caption: Figure 1:Crafterarchitecture. Given context and Docs, the intent reasoner seeds𝒮0\mathcal{S}_{0}. The plan generator𝒟\mathcal{D}proposesKKcandidate plans; Image-Gen backendℰ\mathcal{E}renders each plan; the critic𝒱\mathcal{V}emits directive diagnostics; the specification refinerℛ\mathcal{R}writes typed edits into𝒮\mathcal{S}; and the convergence judge routes each round to accept, refine, or revert to Final output. (Figure is generated byCrafter.)

Figure 2:CraftEditorarchitecture. Three phases convert a rastera∗a^{*}into an editable SVG𝐯\mathbf{v}.Extraction: a VLM designer𝒟\mathcal{D}authors a keep/delete plan, an image editorℰ\mathcal{E}executes it, and𝒱\mathcal{V}verifies the cleaned canvas (§3.3.1).Processing: each element is captioned, grounded, and classified.Composition:𝒟\mathcal{D}generates SVG skeletons,ℰ\mathcal{E}injects assets, and a hybrid critic𝒱\mathcal{V}(VLM++programmatic checkers) drives iterative refinement (§3.3.2). (The Figure was generated byCrafter.)

Figure 3:RepresentativeCraftBenchsamples.
Each column shows one task.
Figure 4:CraftBenchdistribution. Inner: task types; outer: per-task style.
Figure 5:Qualitative comparison across different input conditions.

Figure A1:Manual annotation interfaces for the three reference-conditioned task constructions. Each interface combines the auto-generated conditioning input with task-specific drawing tools (drag-to-mask overlay, rectangle/brush erasers, family-switch regeneration); three graduate-level annotators inspect every sample and a unanimous-agreement rule decides acceptance.

header: Appendix ECraftEditor: Implementation Details and Ablations

images.caption: Figure A6:The blind pairwise human-evaluation interface. The conditioning input (caption, full task instruction, and the input image for edit tasks) is shown at the top, and the annotator then chooses which of the two randomized figures better satisfies it.

Figure A7:Qualitative comparison of editable-output systems on five
cases. Columns: input raster, Edit-Banana, AutoFigure-Edit,CraftEditor(green frame). Per-panel numbers are three-VLM judge means.

Figure A8:RepresentativeCrafterfailure cases. Columns:
conditioning input (caption for the text-to-image rows, reference image
for the reference-conditioned rows),Crafter(red frame), ground truth
(green frame). Rows, top to bottom: dropped panels, mismatched infill,
literal skeleton.
